response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 20 years of development experience, he falls significantly short on the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. His documented AI work spans only ~7 months at re:cinq with MCP and agentic frameworks. Critically, Python is not listed in his skills despite being a required language, and there is no evidence of expertise in essential AI technologies: RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM optimization, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI. For a Staff-level position requiring immediate technical leadership in enterprise GenAI deployments, these gaps are disqualifying.
strengths: 20 years of shipping production software with proven ability across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure—demonstrates engineering maturity and project delivery capability
Recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, plus TypeScript expertise and cloud/infrastructure experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) provide foundation for AI systems work
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, staff-level roles) and Bachelor's degree in Computer Science meet basic credential requirements
concerns: Only ~7 months of documented AI/agentic development work, far short of the explicit 8-year requirement for building production-grade AI solutions
Python not listed in skills despite being a required language; no evidence of expertise in critical AI technologies (RAG, vector databases, LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks)
No demonstrated experience designing or deploying AI systems to enterprise customers, leading technical discovery with stakeholders on AI initiatives, or building data pipelines for ML workflows
